detaileddescription.para: The stub is here in case the upper layers forget to set the handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the upper layer callback reference

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XOspiPsv instance so that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: Reference to a structure containing information about a specific OSPIPSV device. This function initializes an InstancePtr object for a specific device specified by the contents of Config.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started. It must be stopped to re-initialize.

detaileddescription.para: The Upper layer software is responsible for re-configuring (if necessary) and restarting the OSPIPSV device after the reset.

briefdescription.para: Resets the OSPI flash device via OSPI controller.
Performs a transfer on the bus in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: The messages passed are all transferred on the bus between one CS assert and de-assert.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY if a transfer is already in progress.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY if a transfer is already in progress.
XST_FAILURE if DMA transfer is not completed.

briefdescription.para: Performs a transfer on the bus in interrupt mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY if a transfer is already in progress.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if a transfer is already in progress.

briefdescription.para: Stops the transfer of data to internal DST FIFO from stream interface and also stops the issuing of new write commands to memory.

detaileddescription.para: By calling this API, any ongoing Dma transfers will be paused and DMA will not issue AXI write commands to memory

briefdescription.para: Configures TX and RX DLL Delay.

detaileddescription.para: Based on the mode and reference clock this API calculates the RX delay and configure them in PHY configuration register.

parameterdescription.para: 1 to enable dual-byte opcode, 0 to disable.

briefdescription.para: Sets the status callback function, the status handler, which the driver calls when it encounters conditions that should be reported to upper layer software.

detaileddescription.para: The handler executes in an interrupt context, so it must minimize the amount of processing performed. One of the following status events is passed to the status handler.

para.preformatted: XST_SPI_TRANSFER_DONE The requested data transfer is done

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XOspiPsv instance.
CallBackRef
Upper layer callback reference passed back when the callback function is invoked.
FuncPointer
Pointer to the callback function.
None.
The handler is called within interrupt context, so it should do its work quickly and queue potentially time-consuming work to a task-level thread.
